shots.prompt: We sink into a vast glowing ocean of deep blues and violets, shafts of neon light piercing down through luminous water. Serene, seamless continuation.
Translucent jellyfish drift past, each one a tiny swirling galaxy of light, trailing glowing tendrils, multiplying into a sea of stars. Mesmerizing, dreamlike.
Fields of psychedelic coral pulse with shifting rainbow bioluminescence, breathing in kaleidoscopic patterns across the seabed. Hypnotic color waves.
An enormous whale made entirely of flowing light glides slowly overhead, its body a window into a starry cosmos, dwarfing everything. Awe-inspiring, smooth.
